name: Zucchini Supreme
recipeIngredient: 1 package Stove Top Stuffing Mix (chicken flavor)
8 oz New York white sharp cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the zucchini and onion in salted water for 10 minutes, or until tender. Drain and set aside.
2. Toss the stuffing crumbs and seasoning packet with melted butter or margarine.
3. Pour half of the stuffing mixture into a 9x13-inch baking pan.
4. Mix together sour cream, cream of chicken soup, and shredded cheddar cheese in a separate bowl.
5. Add the drained zucchini and mix well.
6. Spoon the zucchini mixture over the stuffing in the pan.
7. Top with the remaining stuffing mixture.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
